title: SRM School of Law appoints former CJI UU Lalit as Professor Emeritus
description: Former Chief Justice of India (CJI) UU Lalit has been appointed as Professor Emeritus at SRM School of Law, SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRMIST), Kanchipuram.During his visit to the SRMIST campus, Justice Lalit delivered a lecture on 'Parliamentary Privileges' with a focus on the constitutional basis and contemporary relevance of the privileges.
